title: Quy Nhon、Binh Dinh — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Quy Nhon、Binh Dinh的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Quy Nhon是Binh Dinh的一個城市，人口約450,000。An emerging coastal destination with beautiful beaches, a developing tourism scene, and one of the lowest costs of living among Vietnam’s provincial capitals.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
